manifest.studyDesign: bounded cross-family benchmark; no causal treatment arm
manifest.sharedQualityEvaluator: occupied modes and mean distance to nearest pinned target center

workAxis.name: deterministic scalar primitive operations per retained sample (DWU)
workAxis.definition: one declared scalar arithmetic, comparison, or transcendental operation in generation; RNG generation and quality evaluation are excluded and reported separately
workAxis.interpretation: reproducible algorithmic accounting, not wall-clock, energy, hardware, or information equivalence

decision: No family winner or causal effect is encoded. Execute both fitted systems, recompute DWU from the ledger, plot shared quality against DWU, and interpret native flow and EBM diagnostics in separate columns.
failure: Direct flow transforms and EBM gradient calls are not equivalent cost units, while normalized flow NLL and raw EBM energy are not comparable quality values; neither pair may share a ranking column.
boundary: DWU is a transparent wall-clock-independent operation count for this implementation, not a latency, energy, hardware, or information-equivalence claim. These planned rows contain no trained benchmark measurements.
